phrases.intent_en: Ask about the street art in the area
phrases.text_local: Où voir les plus belles fresques de street art ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo VWAHR lay ploo bel FRESK duh street ART
phrases.cultural_note: Rue Dénoyez is the street art epicenter — every surface is covered in murals. The art changes constantly. Belleville is Paris's best neighborhood for urban art walks.

responses.english: There is a lot of street art on Rue Denoyez.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah boh-KOO duh street art dahn lah roo duh-nwah-YAY
responses.local: Il y a beaucoup de street art dans la Rue Denoyez.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a good authentic restaurant
phrases.text_local: Vous connaissez un bon restaurant authentique dans le quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: voo koh-neh-SAY uhn bohn res-toh-RAHN oh-tahn-TEEK dahn luh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Belleville has incredible diversity — Chinese, Vietnamese, North African, and Turkish food at local prices. Boulevard de Belleville has great couscous; the side streets hide amazing pho shops.

responses.english: There are good Chinese and Thai restaurants on the boulevard.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah duh bohn res-toh-RAHN shee-NWAH ay tah-ee-lahn-DEH soor luh bool-VAR
responses.local: Il y a de bons restaurants chinois et thaïlandais sur le boulevard.

phrases.text_local: Où est le belvédère de Belleville ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh bel-vay-DEHR duh bel-VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Parc de Belleville's hilltop terrace has one of the best free views of Paris — you can see the Eiffel Tower and the whole skyline. Much less crowded than Sacré-Cœur.

responses.english: The viewpoint is at the top of the park, the view is great.
responses.phonetic: luh bel-vay-DEHR eh tahn oh doo park, lah voo eh mah-nyee-FEEK
responses.local: Le belvédère est en haut du parc, la vue est magnifique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest supermarket is
phrases.text_local: Il y a un supermarché près d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah uhn soo-pehr-mar-SHAY preh dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Small supermarkets like Franprix and Monoprix are common in Paris neighborhoods.

responses.english: Yes, there is a Franprix a bit further down the street.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah uhn frahn-PREE uhn puh ploo bah dahn lah roo
responses.local: Oui, il y a un Franprix un peu plus bas dans la rue.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this is a safe area to walk around
phrases.text_local: C'est un quartier sûr pour se promener ?
phrases.pronunciation: seh uhn kar-TYAY SOOR poor suh prohm-NAY
phrases.cultural_note: Belleville is a lively, gentrifying neighborhood that's perfectly safe during the day. Like all big-city neighborhoods, stay aware in the evening. The main streets are always bustling.

responses.english: Yes, it is a lively neighborhood. No worries during the day.
responses.phonetic: wee, seh tuhn kar-TYAY vee-VAHN. pah duh soo-SEE ahn zhoor-NAY
responses.local: Oui, c'est un quartier vivant. Pas de souci en journée.
